title: Intent/Vlan spec
description: Desired a VLAN (an L2 segment) declared in Git (ADR-0059/0110, a named-singleton provisioning Intent). NOT an Entity (§1.2): cardinality-1, correlated desired<->built by (intentKind, name). v2 (ADR-0110) closes the provider-coupling of the `builder:` seam: the Intent names the `provisioning` capability CLASS via `requires`, never a provider (§1.5); the reconcile resolves the bound provider + its build Workflow and surfaces a GATED build (§5 Flow 1), never auto-launches. 'params' is opaque, validated only against the resolved provider's own input Contract (§1.5) — no per-provider network fields here (§1.1).

projectKind.description: The Entity kind the built infra projects AS (default vlan), so Views select it. Carried on the build's Run-provenance projection — NEVER written by the reconcile (§1.2).

labels.description: Selection labels stamped on the built Entity's projection (per-key owned, ADR-0041).

requires.description: The capability CLASSES this singleton Intent depends on to be built (ADR-0110 D1). Must include `provisioning` (the class, never a named provider — §1.5); the reconcile resolves the concrete provider + its build Workflow via the verified-provider index + estate capability-bindings, fail-closed + observable (§1.8) when none resolves.

params.description: Opaque build params passed to the resolved provider, validated against ITS input Contract downstream (§1.5). Never typed here (§1.1).
